particulars.description: All freehold and leasehold properties (whether registered or unregistered) and all commonhold properties, now or in the future (and from time to time) owned by the chargor, or in which the chargor holds an interest.

The freehold property known as units 1 and 2 twyford road, bishops stortford (CM23 3LJ), title number: HD424917. Part of the freehold property known as land on the east side of twyford road, bishop's stortford, title number: HD293332 and as more particularly described in a transfer of even date between andrew mcbride and jack ashley brown (1) and A2Z mot testing LTD (2) as part of the land on the east side of twyford road comprising the former medisafe building and car park bishop's stortford hertfordshire CM23 3LJ and shown hatched blue on the transfer plan.
